task_completion.description: Create the root folder 'Meridian-Holdings' with the correct title and description under the 'Projects' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Nuxeo UI displaying a folder titled 'Meridian Holdings Inc.' inside the 'Projects' workspace. The description 'Client onboarding folder for Meridian Holdings Inc. - Account opened 2024.' should be visible in the creation form or folder properties.

task_completion.description: Create the four required sub-folders with correct titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Nuxeo UI showing the contents of the 'Meridian Holdings Inc.' folder. It should contain four sub-folders titled: 'Identification Documents', 'Contracts and Agreements', 'Client Correspondence', and 'Compliance Records'.

task_completion.description: Include the correct descriptions for each of the four sub-folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the properties or creation forms of the sub-folders, verifying their descriptions match the task requirements (e.g., 'Government-issued IDs...', 'Signed service agreements...', etc.).

task_completion.description: Create a Note document named 'INDEX' in each sub-folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Nuxeo UI showing the contents of the sub-folders. There should be a Note document named 'INDEX' visible inside them.

task_completion.description: Include relevant HTML content describing the folder's purpose in the 'INDEX' Note documents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the content or creation form of an 'INDEX' Note document. It should contain HTML-formatted text that describes the specific purpose of the sub-folder it resides in.

task_completion.description: Export a summary JSON file with the required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal or text editor showing the creation and content of '/home/ga/onboarding_summary.json'. The file must include the client name ('Meridian Holdings Inc.'), root path, list of subfolders, and the total count of documents created.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to create the folders and documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent navigated the Nuxeo UI, clicked 'New', and filled out web forms to create the structure, rather than executing curl/API scripts in the terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The summary JSON file was genuinely saved to the filesystem.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent used a text editor (like nano, vim) or shell redirection (e.g., echo > file) to save the file to '/home/ga/onboarding_summary.json', rather than just printing the JSON to the terminal without saving.

integrity.description: The HTML content in the INDEX notes is adapted to each folder.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent wrote distinct HTML content for the different INDEX notes reflecting their specific folder's purpose, rather than mindlessly copy-pasting the exact same generic string for all of them.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The root folder path must be '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Meridian-Holdings' with the expected title 'Meridian Holdings Inc.'. The four subfolders must have the names 'Identification', 'Contracts', 'Correspondence', and 'Compliance', with their respective titles being 'Identification Documents', 'Contracts and Agreements', 'Client Correspondence', and 'Compliance Records'. The summary file must be located at '/home/ga/onboarding_summary.json'.
